scripts.dev-nix: export NODE_ENV=development && pnpm run build && pnpm run start-all
scripts.dev-win: set NODE_ENV=development && pnpm run build && pnpm run start-all
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.start-all: pnpm run start-api && pnpm run start-frontend
scripts.start-frontend: cd artifacts/agent-sandbox && set NODE_ENV=development && node start-frontend.js
scripts.platform-info: echo Running on: %OS% && node -e "console.log('Node:', process.version, 'Platform:', process.platform)"
